description: You are a special education teacher at Sunrise Academy setting up GCompris for a student named Marcus who has significant cognitive learning challenges and needs only the most accessible activities. Configure the GCompris difficulty filter so that only activities with a maximum difficulty level of 3 are displayed. Navigate the Math/Numbers and Language/ABC categories to identify visible activities and run at least two of them to verify appropriateness. Create an Individual Accommodation Plan at ~/Desktop/accommodation_plan.txt documenting the difficulty settings, the list of accessible Math and Language activities, and a recommended 5-day weekly activity schedule for Marcus. Login: ga / password123
